import React from "react"; import { useState } from "react"; import "./nav.css"; import "./BurgerMenu.css"; export default function Nav() { const [Active, IsActive] = useState("off"); const [Style, setStyle] = useState("pushMenu2"); const [Burger, setBurger] = useState(""); const handleClick = () => { if (Active === "off") { IsActive("true"); setStyle("pushMenu"); setBurger("open"); } else { IsActive("off"); setStyle("pushMenu2"); setBurger(""); } }; return (
